original_question:
The foci of the hyperbola \( \frac {x^{2}}{a^{2}}- \frac {y^{2}}{b^{2}}=1\) and the parabola \(y^{2}=8x\) intersect at point P, and \(|PF|=5\), where F is the center of both the hyperbola and parabola. Determine the equation of the hyperbola.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
